message:
feat(vc_config): add inline_mode and inline_height TUI config fields

- TuiConfig gains inline_mode (bool, default false) and inline_height (u16, default 20)
- inline_mode renders TUI below the current prompt instead of alternate screen
- inline_height controls reserved terminal rows in inline mode
- Default serialization includes both new fields in [tui] section
- Added test_tui_config_defaults() unit test verifying defaults
- Existing serialization tests updated to assert new fields present

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
